{{CargoClone
|name=Charming Chan
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=170
|gene1={race} RUSH +50
|gene2={race} CIV +50
|gene3=Domain Cabin Output +3%
|gene4=Per 60 Angel Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +6
|gene5=Wind DMG +0.9%
|gene6=Per 60 Angel Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +10
|gene7=Wind DMG +1.5%
|}}
